items.titolo: New Bernie Sanders AI Safety Bill Would Halt Data Center Construction
items.descrizione: The US senator said on Tuesday that a moratorium would give lawmakers time to "ensure that AI is safe." Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will introduce a similar bill in the House in the weeks ahead.

items.titolo: Google's TurboQuant reduces AI LLM cache memory capacity requirements by at least six times — up to 8x performance boost on Nvidia H100 GPUs, compresses KV caches to 3 bits with no accuracy loss
items.descrizione: In benchmarks on Nvidia H100 GPUs, 4-bit TurboQuant delivered up to an eight-times performance increase in computing attention logits compared to unquantized 32-bit keys.

items.titolo: AI, autonomia e fotocamera: Samsung rafforza la fascia media con i Galaxy A57 e A37 5G
items.descrizione: Il mercato degli smartphone continua a essere dominato dalla fascia media: assunto ormai più che noto, validato dai dati di vendita registrati tanto sul mercato italiano quanto su scala globale....

items.titolo: Seagate FireCuda 530R 2TB SSD Review: A stealthy workstation powerhouse
items.descrizione: The Seagate FireCuda 530R is a specialized workstation SSD that prioritizes reliability and performance consistency. With high write endurance and bundled data recovery services, it provides extra peace of mind.

items.titolo: Intel officially releases Xeon 600 chips, announces new vPro Panther Lake CPUs — ‘all-new’ vPro platform goes all-in on AI
items.descrizione: Intel has officially released its Xeon 600 workstation CPUs, previously known as Granite Rapids-WS, as well as detailed new features coming to its vPro platform with new Panther Lake CPUs for businesses.

items.titolo: Samsung è la prima con Knox certificato CC su smart TV e monitor
items.descrizione: Samsung diventa il primo produttore a ottenere la certificazione Common Criteria sia per smart TV che per monitor, rafforzando la sicurezza dei display connessi
